items.title: Slave Trade Act 1824
items.description: An Act to amend and consolidate the Laws relating to the Abolition of the Slave Trade.

items.title: Clerk of the Parliaments Act 1824
items.description: An Act for better regulating the Office of Clerk of the Parliaments.

items.title: Vagrancy Act 1824
items.description: An Act for the Punishment of idle and disorderly Persons, and Rogues and Vagabonds, in that Part of Great Britain called England.

items.title: Entail Provisions Act 1824
items.description: An Act to authorize the Proprietors of Entailed Estates in Scotland to grant Provisions to the Wives or Husbands and Children of such Proprietors.
